findings.message: Recurrence logic is anchored to `deriveIdeaKey()`, which hashes `sourcePath::title`; across archived plans, `sourcePath` changes by slug, so identical idea titles from different plans will not match and recurrence counts will be artificially low (risk: routing thresholds at lines 182/189/190 are never reached in practice).

Script registration work is required (`startup-loop:results-review-prefill` / `startup-loop:pattern-reflection-prefill` at lines 249/252) but `scripts/package.json` is not listed in any task's `Affects` section, creating a plan traceability gap and likely unplanned file mutation.
Token-reduction measurement is "manual" with no defined artifact path or deterministic capture method, so success criteria are hard to audit/reproduce.
